lines.speaker: Miltog
lines.text: Do you want to buy a lamp, surface-dweller?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you fill a lamp with oil please?

lines.speaker: Miltog
lines.text: You can do that yourself! Just put some swamp tar in the lamp oil still here and then use the lamp on the still.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do the lamps around the city work?

lines.speaker: Miltog
lines.text: They work by our very own Dorgeshuun magic!

lines.speaker: Miltog
lines.text: Sometimes they don't work very well, though. The light orbs blow and they have to be replaced.

lines.speaker: Miltog
lines.text: If you ever see a lamp that's gone out, you can fix it by replacing the light orb. You can make new light orbs out of glass, and use a piece of wire on them to add the filament.

lines.speaker: Miltog
lines.text: There's a machine in the south of the city that makes the wire you need.
